title: Senior Investment Banker at RBL Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at RBL Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RBL Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RBL Bank:
RBL Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank!
